name: Sentry
description: Monitor Sentry projects and alert rules for application error tracking and incident response compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Sentry
2. Go to Settings > Developer Settings > Internal Integrations
3. Create a new internal integration
4. Set permissions: Organization: Read, Project: Read, and Alert Rule: Read
5. Click Save, then copy the generated token

credentialFields.label: Auth Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create an Internal Integration token in Sentry > Settings > Developer Settings

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that Sentry projects exist and are actively monitoring errors

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies that Sentry alert rules are configured for incident response
